title: UN Emergency Session: Ceasefire Demands
detail: UN General Assembly emergency special session. 143 nations demand immediate ceasefire. US and Israel vote against. China proposes 72-hour humanitarian pause; US rejects. Global protests in 80+ cities including London, Berlin, Jakarta, Istanbul.

title: Iran Military Command Decapitated
detail: Pentagon confirms 40+ senior Iranian leaders killed including Khamenei, IRGC commander-in-chief, heads of IRGC Navy and Air Force. Acting Supreme Council formed under Mojtaba Khamenei. Chain of command in chaos.

title: Global Oil Crisis Intensifies
detail: Brent crude hits $148/bbl. US announces release of 180M barrels from Strategic Petroleum Reserve. IEA triggers emergency oil sharing. Gas prices reach $6.20/gal in US. China and India accelerate purchases of Iranian oil via shadow fleet.
